findings.description: CRITICAL: prod-cluster-eks shows DIFFERENT status across all 4 views — Dashboard: 'Degraded', Clusters list: 'Error', Detail page: 'Unreachable', Settings: 'unreachable'. v121's main fix (status consistency) is STILL BROKEN for this cluster.
Settings page shows raw lowercase VARCHAR values ('unreachable', 'degraded') instead of proper capitalized enum display. v121 specifically claimed to fix this — fix is NOT applied.
Navbar cluster selector shows '⚪ prod-cluster-eks' (white/offline indicator) while Dashboard shows it as 'Degraded' — yet another inconsistency in status representation.

Navigating to /clusters/prod-cluster-eks (slug URL) throws 'Invalid UUID' error. Cluster detail pages require UUID-based URLs. Sidebar cluster links incorrectly link to /clusters instead of individual detail pages.
Recent Events table on cluster detail page has empty ghost rows at the bottom — likely a rendering/loading artifact.

v121FixVerification.statusConsistency: FAIL — prod-cluster-eks shows 3 different statuses across views
v121FixVerification.normalizeLiveHealthStatusDegraded: PARTIAL — test-cluster-minikube shows 'Degraded' correctly; prod-cluster-eks shows 'Error'/'Unreachable'
v121FixVerification.detailPageReadFromDB: FAIL — detail page shows 'Unreachable' while Dashboard shows 'Degraded'
v121FixVerification.settingsHealthStatusEnum: FAIL — Settings shows raw lowercase 'unreachable'/'degraded' not capitalized enum

passedChecks: Clusters list page loads with table data
test-cluster-minikube detail page loads successfully with real data
Dark mode theme is applied correctly
